title: Create: Deepfried
body:
By the developers of Create: Bitterballen
\ \ \ Content:
  • Berliner (with different fillings)
  • Apfelküchle
  • Corndogs
  • Chicken Nuggets
  • Springrolls
  • Tempura
  • Calamari
  • Fish and Chips
  • Fried Chicken
  • Yuca Fries
And even more with Farmers Delight installed!
  • Onion Rings
  • Blooming Onion
  • Panzerotto
  • There's more to come in the future :D
  Planned:
  • Snacks from Africa
  • Snacks from Oceania
FAQ: Will this mod get X feature? If it's a big technical feature it will probably be handed down to C:Bitterballen. If it's a deepfried snack, then it belongs in this mod. When version 1.xx? We're only on the versions that C:Bitterballen is on, which for the foreseeable future is 1.20.1 and 1.19.2.   \ Dependencies: \ [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Adds Kinetics\ [Create: Bitterballen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-bitterballen) - Adds Mechanical fryer    Optional Dependencies:  \ [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) -With this installed you get access to additional snacks   Recommended: \ [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) -Shows what block you're looking at\ [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) -Shows recipes\ [Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) -Shows food values   This mod was made with Modified assets from the Create Mod under the MIT License.
